name: eBillity Timesheet
tagline: Log and manage your TimeTracker hours by just talking to Claude.
needs: Claude connected to Chrome, and you signed into eBillity in that browser.
say: Log 2 hours on AMP-048 for yesterday.

name: ColorProof
tagline: Brand color preflight and auto-corrector for Adobe Illustrator.
needs: Adobe Illustrator installed and open, with automation allowed.
say: Proof this logo package against our brand colors.

name: Illustrator Data Merge
tagline: One template, a list of records, one finished file per record.
needs: Adobe Illustrator installed and open, with automation allowed.
say: Build a label for each row in this spreadsheet from my template.

name: PanelProof
tagline: Read-only content and visual proofer for Illustrator artwork. Pairs with Data Merge.
needs: Adobe Illustrator installed and open, with automation allowed.
say: Proof these panels against this spec sheet.

name: Reskin Kit
tagline: Restyle a project to match a reference's look and feel, animation included.
needs: Claude connected to Chrome, plus the project you want to restyle (it works on a git branch).
say: Reskin this page to match the look and feel of stripe.com.

name: Client Work → LinkedIn
tagline: Turn a finished client project into a ready-to-post LinkedIn post.
needs: A project to point it at: a code repo, a folder of design files, or its brief in Notion or Google Drive.
say: Turn the project we just wrapped into a LinkedIn post.

name: Add Skill
tagline: Publish a new skill to the Capsule catalog the right way.
needs: The Capsule Skills repo cloned locally with git push access (~/capsule-skills-site on the MacBook, ~/Developer/capsule-skills-site on the Mac Studio), plus the new skill's SKILL.md ready to publish.
say: Add a new skill to the Capsule catalog.
